/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/packet_analyzer.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/packet_analyzer.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/packet_analyzer.dir/src/ProtocolDissector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/packet_analyzer.dir/src/ThreatEngine.cpp.o -o packet_analyzer  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpcap.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsqlite3.so
